_comment: Tier-2: skfem's ElementVector stores DoFs INTERLEAVED (x0,y0,x1,y1,...), not blocked (x0,...,xN,y0,...,yN). Naive `u.reshape(2, -1)` scrambles components across rows. The proper extraction is via `ib.nodal_dofs` (shape (n_components, n_nodes)) — `u[ib.nodal_dofs[0]]` is the x-component, `u[ib.nodal_dofs[1]]` the y-component. This is the canonical PR #20 pitfall verified operationally: the wrong reshape produces NON-matching values vs the correct nodal_dofs extraction.
